titleStmt.title: SII 10.415: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 415. (A.R. No. 175 of 1905.) ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE IN THE SAME TEMPLE. Ś. 1189. (Prabhava)

summary.p: States that Siddayadēva-Chōḍa-Mahārāja gave 50 cows for a perpetual lamp in the temple of Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva for the merit of his father Perumāḍidēva Chōḍa-Mahārāja and mother Dāmaladēvi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśubhaśakhavaruṣaṁbulu 1189 Agunēṁṭi prabhavasaṁvatsara śrāvaṇa
śu 11 maṁgaḷavāramunāṁḍu svasti caraṇasarōruhavihita
vilōcana trilōcanapramukhākhilapridhvīśvarakāritakāvērītīra karikālakula
ratnapradīva Aparimitapratāpa vitatasamarccarccitalakṣmīśvara yoṟayūri
puravarādhīśvara kāṁcīpuratripuratrinētra kāśyapagōtrapavitra Aḍicatu
rakāminījanajayaṁta turagarēvaṁta vitaraṇavinōdavikramāditya tēṁka
ṇāditya ripubalatimiramārtaṁḍa jagadobbagaṁḍa garvvitārātinripālakuladharakuli
śadhara śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjara dāyādimaṁḍalikadiśāpaṭṭagharaṭṭa kīrttinā
rāyaṇa rājanītiparāyaṇa paranārīdūra ssyāhasōttuṁga Ayya
nasiṁga nāmādi samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara si
ddayadēvacōḍamahārājulu tama taṁḍri śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara peru
māḍida(dē)vacōḍa mahārājukuṁ tama talli dāmaladēvikiṁ buṇyamugānu
śrītripurāṁttaka śrīmanmahādēvaraku Akhaṁḍadīpāna kiccina mōdālu 50
Digital edition of SII 10.415 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
